questions.question:
Worst case scenario in case of linear search algorithm is ______________ .



Algorithms: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist A
options: Item is somewhere in the middle of the array.
Item is not in the array at all.
Item is the last element in the array.
Item is the last element in the array or is not there at all.
questions.correct_answer: Item is the last element in the array or is not there at all.
